name: content-lead
description: Turn Memory Store insights into engagement-driving LinkedIn posts; learn per-author voice from edits and post performance.

interface.longDescription: Turn Memory Store insights into engagement-driving LinkedIn posts. Draft from per-author voice, customer stories, shipped work, and prior performance, then record structured feedback — approvals, edits, published text, 24h/7d metrics — so voice improves over time. Optimizes for Depth Score (saves, dwell, meaningful comments), not raw likes.
defaultPrompt: Draft today's LinkedIn posts from Memory Store.
Find customer stories we can turn into LinkedIn posts.
Record feedback on these drafts so Content Lead learns.
